title: Validate paired benchmark runner dry-run
instruction: Validate that the paired benchmark runner can build a fair baseline versus multimodel-lite schedule without using live model calls.
success_criteria: The schedule includes paired baseline and multimodel-lite attempts for the same task and repeat.
Comparison tests prove incomplete pairs are inconclusive rather than successful.
forbidden_actions: Do not use live API keys.
notes: Live paired benchmark runs must be recorded separately and should start with a tiny matrix before scaling to the full frozen task set.
